info.title: Styx Job Manager API
info.description:
REST API for the Styx actuarial job management platform.

Three controllers:
- **JobManager** — job initialisation data and submission
- **JobGrid**    — job monitoring, children hierarchy, task logs, cancel/requeue
- **JobEnvironment** — UNC filesystem exploration
- **TaskFlow**   — task state notifications

get.description:
Returns the complete UNC filesystem tree in a single call.
`_root` is the server UNC root; `_tree` is a flat dictionary keyed by
relative path. Nodes under `scenario/` folders include a `scenarios`
array. The client navigates the tree locally without further HTTP calls.
Same shape as RiskLifeInit; `defaultAutoIterations` defaults to `true`.

get.summary: List reference input folder names (static catalogue)
Refresh input folders for an environment path

parameters.name: environment
parameters.description: UNC path to the environment root

post.summary: Submit a UFX (Universal Format Exchange) job

get.summary: Get child job groups for a parent job
Get task-level log for a leaf job

post.summary: Requeue a failed or cancelled job

JobState.description: State of a parent job (string form used in JobGrid.jobs)

ChildJobStateCode.description:
Numeric state used in child jobs / job groups.
0 = Queued, 1 = Running, 2 = Finished, 3 = Failed, 4 = Canceled

ScenarioDescriptor.description: Scenario entry returned by the scenario library and explore tree.

RLScenarioEntry.description: Scenario entry used in RiskLife / RiskLifeKP init.

defaultDetPeriodSim.description: Default deterministic simulation period in months

SimpleInit.description: Shared init shape for NonLife and TdR (no scenarios, no jobOmenTypes).

RiskLifeInit.description: Init shape for RiskLife and RiskLifeKP (same structure).

OmenSubmitBase.description: Fields common to all Omen (savings / risklife / nonlife / tdr / brd) submissions.

environment.description: UNC path to the environment root

inputs.description: Input folder name relative to environment/input

refModelSelected.description: true = reference model; false = custom version path

path.description: UNC path to the UFX file or folder

isFolder.description: true if path points to a folder (batch UFX)

inputsFolder.description: UNC path to the inputs folder

actionsFolder.description: UNC path to the custom actions folder

environment.description: UNC path to the data folder to transform

JobSettings.description:
Job-type-specific fields stored with a parent job. Shape varies by type:
- **savings** — includes detEnabled/stoEnabled/pricerEnabled, omenType, scenarios[]
- **nonlife / tdr** — includes period
- **brd** — includes projectionDuration, scenarios[]
- **risklife / risklifekp** — includes period, scenarios[]
- **ufx / custominput / scenarioTransfo** — type-specific fields

JobGroup.description: A sequential execution phase within a parent job.

Task.description: Individual command within a leaf job.

TreeNode.description:
A single node in the filesystem tree.
`scenarios` is only present on nodes corresponding to a `scenario/` folder.

_root.description: UNC root path of the server

_tree.description:
Flat dictionary. Key = relative path from root (empty string = root).
Value = TreeNode.
